rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ADA C. UNRUH FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer Of David Hillbrand, Executor Of The Will Of William James Shiloh Unruh, Deceased, To Petition For Instructions By Marjory Halligan [Ccp 430.10]; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Within 30 days from the Court's order, Petitioner Marjory Halligan must file an amended petition to allege (if she can) new facts that may cure the defects of the First Amended Petition that was previously denied as time-barred. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order. Any party choosing to contest must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than September 1, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.
